health.narrative: Globex Holdings's CMS Enhanced subscription is performing well with annual billing at $185,400 ARR. No analytics subscription is currently active. Contract renewal is on track with strong product adoption indicators.
recommendedActions: Schedule QBR to discuss expansion opportunities for Analytics product line
Confirm renewal timeline 90 days before contract end
Explore additional CMS features and training needs
